title: Sangarsha
desc: An orphan faces oppression after the death of the person who took him in.

title: Guru
desc: Best friends Raja and Iqbal, who hail from different religious backgrounds, help the local people. Their friendship is at stake when Raja's brother falls in love with Iqbal's fiancee.

title: Sentimentaal
desc: Suryaa Roy, a police officer, deals with Rudrani Chowdhury who runs illicit trades.

title: Shakthi
desc: Shakthi presents stories of courage, determination, and perseverance, inspiring viewers through strong character arcs and transformative challenges.

title: Pati Parameshwar
desc: Chaos ensues when a couple's pet dog runs away one afternoon.

title: Abar Bibaho Obhijaan
desc: A gangster lures three friends to Bangkok with a fake lump sum inheritance.

title: Besh Korechi Prem Korechi
desc: Abhi helps the sister of a gangster to elope on the day of her wedding. However, later, his life takes a turn when he falls in love with his other sister.

title: Bogla Mama Jug Jug Jiyo
desc: Bogla Mama, known for his theatre obsession, is hired by a local don to stage a play.

title: Cockpit
desc: Cockpit immerses audiences in high-stakes aviation drama, blending tension, courage, and resilience as characters navigate life-threatening challenges.

title: Black Coffee
desc: A director torn between his wife and his mistress tries to find solace in his creativity.

title: Agni
desc: A police officer is targeted by terrorists, but the terrorists mistakenly kill a bus of schoolchildren, raising crime concerns.

title: Maayakumari
desc: A director sets out to make a biopic on a famed actress and explores her disappearance.

title: Gotro
desc: An elderly woman strikes a unique bond with the ex-convict who is entrusted with taking care of her, in this heartwarming story of love, faith and redemption.

title: Chini
desc: Chaos ensues when Cheeni moves back into her house to look after her mother.

title: Achena Atithi
desc: After Pratap's untimely death, his wife Puja is arrested for murdering his family members.

title: Tirandaj Shabor
desc: Cab driver Sumit rushes a sick passenger to the police, only to become the prime suspect when the passenger dies. Investigators uncover dark secrets and numerous potential culprits.

title: Jongole Mitin Mashi
desc: A determined lady detective battles an illegal gang poaching wild elephants. Can she tackle the challenges and save these majestic creatures from extinction?

title: Tenida And Company
desc: A group of friends in Darjeeling help a scientist protect his formula from a Japanese spy.

title: Phool Aar Pathor
desc: Swadhin sets out to expose the evil thug who is trying to take over his father's estates.

title: Habji Gabji
desc: A young boy, neglected by his ambitious parents, turns to online gaming and becomes addicted. As his obsession deepens, the situation spirals, causing serious problems for his parents.

title: Ballavpur Er Roopkatha
desc: While trying to sell his palace, Bhupati Ray's ancestor's ghost becomes a chaotic hurdle.

title: Tumi Asbe Bole
desc: Nanda, a young man, moves to Kolkata to find better job opportunities and meets Aankhi, whom he falls in love with. Soon, he seeks her hand in marriage but does not show up when the big day arrives.

title: Mon Sudhu Toke Chai
desc: A landlord's daughter falls in love with a helper by defying her father's authority.

title: Hungamaa
desc: Upon failure in his attempt to repay his debts, the owner of a construction firm sets his two sons on an epic quest to help him in completing the task.

title: Aay Khuku Aay
desc: A family with a single parent, that is the dad, and daughters support one another in life.

title: Haami
desc: Bhutu and Chini's friendship falls prey to their parents' judgements.

title: Ashrita
desc: A woman protests against oppression from her husband's family and society. With the support of an educated family, she reaches a climax, succeeding in meting out punishment to her oppressors.

title: Bagh Bandi Khela
desc: An anthology of three stories about people whose lives are affected by crime.

title: Arundhati
desc: During a visit to her native place, Arundhati learns that she looks like her great-grandmother, Jejamma. Soon, Jejamma's battles become her own as she fights a black magician who wants to kill her.

title: Bagha Jatin
desc: Jatindranath Mukherjee is revered for his role in India's freedom struggle.

title: Chaamp
desc: Shibaji, an Indian boxer, faces a setback after an accident but makes a comeback to reclaim his fame and become a champion once more.

title: Badshahi Angti
desc: Two cousins investigate the disappearance of a stolen ring belonging to Emperor Aurangzeb.

title: Antony Kobiyal
desc: Portuguese Christian Anthony Firingee falls in love with Bengal's culture and diving into Bengali songs.

title: Hyper
desc: Surya is overprotective about his father, Narayana Murthy, who is an honest government officer. When Narayana Murthy locks horns with a powerful minister, Surya takes matters into his own hands.

title: Banglar Badhu
desc: Mala aids her husband on the wrong path. Brother-in-law Gokul eyes their property, complicating matters.

title: Masoom
desc: The story about an innocent teenage couple who grow a very good friendship between them.

title: Ebong Kiriti
desc: The story revolves round a murder and in presence of many witnesses.

title: Bogla Mama Jug Jug Jio
desc: Meet a middle-aged theater enthusiast adored by his town for his knack for solving problems. His passion for the arts and clever solutions make him a local hero!

title: Aalo
desc: Aalo offers rich storytelling with romance, family bonds, and societal issues, highlighting the emotional depth of its characters.
